reference: I have a purple, dark lump on my bikini line. It has been there for months now. It went down, then came back up, and now it also has a little pinprick hole on the lump. Pus, blood, and clear fluids come out of the lump when I squeeze it. What could it be? How do I get rid of it?
text: I have a purple dark lump on my bikini line. It has been there for months now. It went down, then came back up, and now it also has a little pinprick hole on the lump. Pus, blood, and clear fluids come out of the lump when I squeeze it. What could it be? How do I get rid of it?
